text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume and her trainer are two parts of a whole. They
encourage and support each other to achieve victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The trainer's role is to draw out the full potential of an Umamusume
through rigorous daily practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I need to pull out all the stops for Gold Ship's training in order for
her to seize the win!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heya, Trainer! Hope you're ready to plunder an underwater temple!
choice_data_list: Whoa, hold on! We're training today.
Whoa, hold on! We're training today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh? You implying that exploring some sunken ruins isn't training?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: There's ancient splendor in the deep! And you're saying the noble pursuit of the unknown is not training?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well, you'd be absolutely right.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anywho, it seems like you really wanna practice today. Fret not, good
trainer, I totally get where you're coming from.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: When I say hey, you say ho. I'm the Sherlock to your Holmes.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're so close, we don't need silly ol' words to get in the way! So let's
hit the road! Follow meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never thought we'd be on the same page! I'd better hurry after her
to the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're finally at the training course... Wait, this isn't the
track.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaagh! Fish! Fish! Fishin' for fish! What's our catch gonna be?
We're going after the largest—the hugest! It's big catch or nothing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Geez, don't just stand there! We're in this together!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Seriously? We came all the way to the waterfront. Obviously, the only
thing we can do is go fishing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
My poor old pops, the best fisher in the village, retired from duty
before he could ever catch the big granddaddy of this river...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's why! As his proud daughter, I'm gonna catch that legend!
Arrrgh! Get ready, you jerk fish! I'll get you if it's the last thing I do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My head's still reeling from all this, but we cast our lines into the river.
Several minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It's no good. The only thing we've caught are stupid water weeds.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Urrrgh! Aaaagh! I can't take it—I'm about to collapse from boredom!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Follow me, Trainer! I'm setting our sails for Mars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This could be good! Maybe she got so bored she finally wants to start
training!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, waitress! One grilled fish platter, and pile that rice high!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew, that was a close call. We got zilch from fishing, but eating a
big one here should make up for it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Enough talk—time to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mere seconds after her fish platter arrives, she downs the whole meal
in a few gulps...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, just what I needed. I'm eternally grateful for the existence of
sustenance.
choice_data_list: So... can we finally start training?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What? You mean to tell me fishing for fish and then eating fish isn't
training?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're living off the land here. It's a struggle for survival, fraught with
danger...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Living in harmony with nature and honing our senses in the wild—open
your eyes. It's all connected to racing!
choice_data_list: Ah, so this is all to train your racing instincts!
Ah, so this is all to train your racing instincts!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nah, it's probably no help at all!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
In that case, now that I've had a meal, might as well head over to
Golshi Farms and tend the carrots.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Catch you on the other side of the solar system! Farewell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's out the door by the time I realize we went the entire day
without doing a minute of training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An Umamusume and trainer are two parts of a whole... We're supposed to work together to achieve victory!
